title: FAMILY EMPOWERMENT - 211info
text: LATINO COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION FAMILY EMPOWERMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides legal clinics, assistance with the citizenship process, housing support and advocacy, education support and advocacy, tax assistance including Individual Taxpayer Identification Number (ITIN) application and renewal, referrals to jobs, translation and interpretation assistance, and information and referral to outside community resources. 2680 NE Twin Knolls Drive Suite 110 Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Unrestricted, but focus on individuals who identify as Latino or Hispanic Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday 10am-5pm, Tuesday 10am-7pm Email (541) 382-4366 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 382-4366 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake screening FEES: Annual membership fee: $20 and up English and computer classes: $30 Most services, including legal consultation, are free DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties Services: Certificates/Forms Assistance * Immigration Issues Job Finding Assistance * Hispanic/Latino Community Legal Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community Specialized Information and Referral * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - WORKFORCE EMPOWERMENT PROGRAM HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LATINO COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION
